examples: He cried dismally, "why ever did I do it?"
None of this is likely to be on hand if you cannot even afford to mend the dismally few highways you have.
The family dog began to howlalong dismally.
In Durban, all efforts by the polite European friends of Yasser Arafat failed dismally.
Rim is one single small company that is dismally small compared to the world.
